description: Baseline: 90/90 tests passing, 2266 lines
Cycle 1: Added searchAdvanced() with BM25 scoring, 6 new tests (96/96)
Cycle 2: Added merge() for two-memory merging, 5 new tests (101/101)
Cycle 3: Added exportAll()/importAll() for backup/restore, 3 new tests (104/104)
Cycle 4: Added findRelated() for related memory discovery, 7 new tests (111/111)
v0.7.0: Added delete(id) single-memory deletion + scheduledMaintenance() combining decay/consolidate/compact. 130 tests (was 90). 40 new tests, ~45 lines src added.
v0.8.0: reindex() API + fix stale tag/entity index bug in put(). scheduledMaintenance now includes reindex. 133 tests (was 130). 3 new tests.
v0.9.0: findDuplicates+archive/restore+validate, 14 new tests (133→147), 1642→1797 lines
v0.9.1: tagCloud+aggregate, 7 new tests (147→154)
v0.9.2: searchByTime+deduplicate, 7 new tests (154→161)
v0.9.3: memoryGraph+compact, 7 new tests (161→168), 1797→1940 lines
v0.9.5: LLM记忆提取 (extractWithLLM + extractHybrid) — 9 new tests (175→184)
v0.9.6: touch(id) lightweight access tracking — update accessedAt/accessCount without changelog. 4 new tests (184→188).
Cycle 1: Added count(filter)+random(opts) APIs — 9 new tests (188→197)
Cycle 2: Added recent(opts) sorted retrieval — 4 new tests (197→201). v0.9.7 total: 13 new API methods since v0.9.6.
Cycle 3: Added mergeMemories(ids,opts) explicit merging — 5 new tests (201→206). v0.9.7 complete: 3 APIs, 18 new tests, 0 rollbacks.
query()+findByEntity()+batchUpdate() — 13 new tests
snapshot()+diff() — 3 new tests
tagStats() — 2 new tests
listArchived() API - lists archived memories with limit support, 4 new tests (224→228)
v0.9.8: renameTag()+mergeTags() — batch tag management APIs. 8 new tests (228→236). Pre-existing changes() test failure unrelated.
v0.9.8: bulkTag(ids,{add,remove}) batch tag mutation — add/remove tags on multiple memories by ID. 5 new tests (236→241). Committed.
BM25 hybrid search: BM25Index class + bigram tokenizer + searchBM25() + searchHybrid() RRF fusion. 24 new tests (241→265), 2470→2704 lines.
searchEmbedding() pure vector search — cosine similarity ranking with layer filter, threshold, limit. 7 new tests (265→272).
searchUnified() — 3-way RRF fusion (BM25+semantic+embedding). Graceful embedding fallback. 6 new tests (272→278).
suggestTags() — tag recommendation via content overlap, tag name match, frequency bonus. Supports limit, minScore, layer filter. 6 new tests (278→284).
L3 Skill/SOP layer: SkillStore + learnSkill/getSkill/listSkills/deleteSkill/recordSkillUsage. 13 new tests (284→297).

healthScore() API — comprehensive memory health monitoring (0-100 score) with 4 dimensions: expiry, access, weight, changelog. Returns actionable recommendations. 7 new tests (302→309), ~66 lines src added.
memoryTimeline(id) — per-memory changelog timeline. 4 new tests (309→313).
searchByTags() — tag filter with AND/OR logic. Fix: add() respects passed weight. 6 new tests (313→319).
exportCompact() — lightweight export. 5 new tests (319→324).
autoMaintain() API — automatic maintenance triggered by health score thresholds. Supports threshold, tasks whitelist, dryRun. 5 new tests (324→329), ~93 lines added.
searchSimilar(id, opts) — find similar memories by ID using searchUnified. Supports limit, layer, minScore. Excludes source. 5 new tests (329→334), ~16 lines src.
inspect(id) — deep memory diagnostics. 5 new tests (334→339). ~13 lines src.

3 new APIs: findDuplicatePairs(minSimilarity/layer/limit), exportJSON/importJSON(backup+restore+merge), pruneLowWeight(minWeight/layer/dryRun/limit). 14 new tests (339→353), ~108 lines src, 3334→3442 total. Key fix: dbPath vs dir constructor param.
clusterByTopic(opts) — group memories by tag co-occurrence. Supports minClusterSize, layer, limit. Greedy no-double-assign. 6 new tests (359→365), ~40 lines src.
Cycle 1: compareMemories(id1, id2) — detailed comparison with merge recommendation. 5 new tests (371→376), ~35 lines src.
Cycle 2: tagHierarchy(opts) — tag co-occurrence hierarchy with depth stats. 4 new tests (376→380), ~55 lines src.
Cycle 3: rebalance(opts) — weight recalculation based on age/access/layer. 4 new tests (380→384), ~30 lines src.
autoTag(opts) — automatically apply suggestTags to untagged memories. Supports dryRun, maxTags, minScore, layer filter. 5 new tests (384→389), ~40 lines src.
fix mergeClusters skip-already-tagged bug
add memoryReport() diagnostic API +5 tests
add batchGet()+memoryReport() APIs +9 tests
clusterHealth(opts) — cluster quality metrics (orphaned detection, avgWeight, uniqueLayers, minClusterSize filter). 5 new tests (404→409), ~35 lines src.
topEntities() API — entity ranking by frequency*avgWeight. Supports limit, layer, minCount, topTags. 6 new tests (415→421), ~35 lines src.
tagSearch() API — fuzzy tag discovery with exact/prefix/substring/overlap scoring. Supports limit, minScore. 6 new tests (421→427), ~30 lines src.
memoryDiff(id1,id2) API — content similarity + tags/entities/layers/weights diff. 6 new tests (427→433), ~25 lines src.
clusterAutoMerge(opts) — auto-merge orphaned/small clusters by tag co-occurrence. Uses clusterHealth to find candidates, merges into best target. 5 new tests (433→438), ~40 lines src.
searchByTimeRange(opts) — temporal search by createdAt with layer/tag/sort/pagination. 11 new tests (445→456), ~25 lines src. Build on key-development-2/3 (clusterAutoMerge + contentHistory).

contentRollback(id, versionIndex) — restore previous content version by index. Auto-snapshots current before rollback. 7 new tests (456→463), ~25 lines src. Builds on contentHistory/contentVersionDiff from k-d-3.
fix: ChangelogStore.since() >= race — changes() test no longer flaky on same-ms timestamps
Hindsight Phase 1: classifyFact() + searchByFactType(). 9 new tests (463→472), auto-classify on add, manual override, pagination.
statsByFactType() + reclassifyFact(). 5 new tests (472→477). Hindsight Phase 1 complete.
agent-task-cli: Cache resetStats() + entries(). 4 new tests (331→335).
AMS: bulkReclassify(opts). 4 new tests (477→481). Batch reclassify by factType/layer/tags.

searchByContent(pattern, opts) — regex/substring content search. Layer/tag filter, caseSensitive, pagination, invalid regex handling. 10 new tests (481→491), ~30 lines src. Builds on k-d-2 searchByTimeRange + k-d-3 contentRollback.
description
contentBranch(id, opts) — fork memory as independent branch with bidirectional derived_from links. 8 new tests (491→499), ~25 lines src. Builds on k-d-2 searchByContent + k-d-3 contentRollback.

searchGraph(startEntity, opts) — entity-based multi-hop graph traversal via entity_index + LinkStore.traverse(). Supports depth/layer/minWeight/linkTypes/direction/limit. 10 new tests (499→509). Hindsight Phase 2 step 1.
searchTemporal(opts) — time-decay search with configurable halfLife, layer/tag/minScore filters. 7 new tests (509→519). Hindsight Phase 3. Score = weight * 0.5^(age/halfLife).

memoryMerge(id1, id2, opts) — merge two memories with conflict resolution. Content strategies (concat/keep-longer/keep-newer/manual), tag strategies (union/primary/secondary), entity union, link rewiring/dropping. 10 new tests (519→529). Builds on k-d-2 searchByContent + k-d-3 contentBranch + searchGraph + searchTemporal.
searchByBranch(id,opts) + bulkMerge(pairs,opts). 11 new tests (529→540). ~45 lines src. Builds on k-d-2 memoryMerge + k-d-3 contentBranch.

addOpinion(topic,content,opts) + searchOpinions(topic,opts) + evolveConfidence(id,delta,opts) — Hindsight Phase 4 opinion network. Confidence with evidence-driven evolution. 16 new tests (540→556), ~60 lines src. Builds on Phase 1-3.
